name: Tarot Vision Mark
description: Camada técnica aplicada por código sobre a arte final. Marcadores mais visíveis para leitura por câmera, mantendo aparência decorativa.

encoding.orientation: 4 fixed dark dots in an L shape plus a small dark star near top-left corner
encoding.card_id: 7-bit binary, MSB left-to-right, located at top-right corner
encoding.group: 3-bit binary, MSB left-to-right, located at bottom-left corner
encoding.checksum: 4-bit binary, MSB left-to-right, checksum=(id ^ (group << 1) ^ 0xA) & 0xF, located at bottom-right corner
encoding.active_slot: gold-ringed dot with matte dark-brown center
encoding.inactive_slot: gold-ringed dot with no dark center
